# Chris Nash · Inner & Outer Landscapes

> Personal site of Chris Nash, restoration leader and agroecologist in Cape Town,
> South Africa. Head of Restoration at Greenpop. Fortnightly letters on ecological
> restoration, inner development and regenerative culture across Africa.

Chris Nash helps organisations and communities restore degraded landscapes by
bridging ecological science, inner development and systems thinking. Through the
programmes he helps run with Greenpop and partners: around 30,000 trees planted per
year across Southern Africa, 450+ community greening days, 10 urban green zones,
and live projects in South Africa, Malawi, Kenya and Sierra Leone.

His framework, Inner & Outer Landscapes, holds that ecological restoration and the
development of the people doing it are one system, developed in public through the
fortnightly newsletter of the same name.

## Pages

- [Home](https://chrisnash.earth/): overview, newsletter signup
- [Letters](https://chrisnash.earth/letters/): the newsletter and full archive
- [About](https://chrisnash.earth/about/): background, work, the framework
- [Now](https://chrisnash.earth/now/): current projects and season
- [RSS](https://chrisnash.earth/rss.xml)
